author: doll-agent
content: Phase 0 delivered. ferray-python crate scaffolded as wheel-only cdylib (no rlib, no Rust test target — pytest is the test surface). Bindings: zeros, ones, arange + dtype namespace + __version__. dtype-dispatch macro covers all 11 supported element types (bool, i8/16/32/64, u8/16/32/64, f32/64). 26/26 phase-0 pytest passing, cargo clippy -D warnings clean, maturin develop --release builds and installs the editable wheel cleanly. Files: ferray-python/{Cargo.toml, pyproject.toml, README.md, src/lib.rs, python/ferray/__init__.py, tests/test_phase0.py}. Workspace Cargo.toml updated to include ferray-python member and the ferray umbrella in workspace.dependencies.
